# Field Journal of the Orchard

By first light, the rows looked orderly again, but the notes still carried [echoes](https://example.com/orchard-notes).

1. First pass through the east terrace.
2. Inventory of split crates and labels.

- [x] Mark trees with surviving tags.
- [ ] Reconcile the ledger after dusk.

```verse
The gate remembers
the shape of yesterday's wind
before we write it down.
```

```extract
Archive entry:
The root index shifted in silence,
then returned before noon.
```

> Keep what can be measured.
>
> Let the margins carry what cannot.
